revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Asakura-jinja (Wakayama)]][[ja:朝椋神社]] {{Expand Japanese|朝椋神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Asakura Shrine (Q17191190) | native_name = 朝椋神社 | image = Asakura-jinja (Wakayama) haiden.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Asakura Shrine (Q17191190) | coordinates = {{coord|34.2368476|135.1718727}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|ca|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|es|Ōkuninushi|fa|اوکونینوشی|fr|Ōkuninushi|hu|Ókuninusi|id|Ookuninushi|it|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主|ko|오오쿠니누시|mni|ꯑꯣꯀꯨꯅꯤꯅꯨꯁꯤ|pl|Ōkuninushi|pt|Ookuninushi|ru|Окунинуси|simple|Ōkuninushi|sr|Okuninuši|sv|Ōkuninushi|tr|Ōkuninushi|uk|Окунінуші|vi|Ōkuninushi|zh|大國主|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Asakura Shrine'''|朝椋神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kii Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11604948|ltq=Q11604948|qid=Q11604948|1=List of Shikinaisha in Kii Province}} ** Series ordinal: 14 ** P155: {{ill|Ikuhimeno Shrine|lt=Ikuhimeno Shrine|qid=Q135041277|1=Ikuhimeno Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q17225876|ltq=Q17225876|qid=Q17225876|1=Sasihiko Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * کیئی|fr|Province de Kii|gl|Provincia de Kii|id|Provinsi Kii|it|Kii (provincia)|ja|紀伊国|ko|기이국|lt|Kijo žemė|nl|Kii (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Kii|pt|Província de Kii|ru|Кии (провинция)|simple|Kii Province|sk|Kii (provincia)|sr|Провинција Киј|th|แคว้นคิอิ|tr|Kii (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Кії|vi|Tỉnh Kii|zh_min_nan|Kii-kok|zh|紀伊國|qid=Q864053|1=Kii Province}} * {{ill|Q11415547|ltq=Q11415547|qid=Q11415547|1=Nagusa district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.2368476|135.1718727}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Asakura-jinja (Wakayama) haiden.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q276944|ltq=Q276944|qid=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183147 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * Мастор|my|ဂျပန်နိုင်ငံ|mzn|جاپون|nap|Giappone|nds_nl|Japan|nds|Japan|ne|जापान|new|जापान|nia|Jepang|nl|Japan|nlnews|Categorie:Japan|nlvoyage|Japan|nn|Japan|nov|Japan|no|Japan|nqo|ߗ߭ߊߔߐ߲߫|nrm|Japon|nr|Japane|nso|Japane|nv|Binááʼádaałtsʼózí Dineʼé ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6170005000262 == Commons category (P373) == * Asakura-jinja (Wakayama) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '和歌山県和歌山市鷺ノ森明神丁22番地', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '和歌山県和歌山市鷺の森', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Asakura-jinja (Wakayama)}} [[JA:朝椋神社]] {{wikidata link|Q17191190}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Asakura Shrine |Image = [[File:Asakura-jinja (Wakayama) haiden.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (worship hall) |Location = {{ill|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|Q131314|qid=Q131314|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Wakayama City|Q200747|qid=Q200747|1=Wakayama (city)}} 22 Saginomori Myōjin-chō |Coordinates = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|14|12.59|N|135|10|19.18|E|region:JP-30_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Asakura Shrine}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village Shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage sites = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|qid=Q2919|1=October 15}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Wakayama|label=Asakura Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Asakura-jinja (Wakayama) torii.JPG|thumb|200px|right|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Asakura Shrine''' (あさくらじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Saginomori Myōjin-chō, {{ill|lt=Wakayama City|Q200747|qid=Q200747|1=Wakayama (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|Q131314|qid=Q131314|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. It is listed as a {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, and under the {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a {{ill|lt=Village Shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined Deity === * {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōkuninushi}} Regarding the enshrined deity, *{{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|qid=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}* presents a theory identifying it as Ame-no-Iwahofuwake-no-Mikoto, similar to {{ill|lt=Asakura Shrine (Kōchi City)|Q11517328|qid=Q11517328|lt=Asakura Shrine|1=Asakura Shrine (Kōchi)}} (あさくらじんじゃ) in {{ill|lt=Kōchi City|Q200251|qid=Q200251|1=Kōchi, Kōchi}}, {{ill|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|Q134093|qid=Q134093|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}. === History === === Overview === The shrine’s early history is unknown. In the *{{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}* *{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Register of Deities|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}* from the mid-{{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}, it is recorded as “Asakura Shrine” in {{ill|lt=Nagusa District|Q11415547|qid=Q11415547|1=Nagusa district}}, {{ill|lt=Kii Province|Q864053|qid=Q864053|1=Kii Province}}, and is listed as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}. The *{{ill|lt=Kii Province Jinmyōchō|Q17210008|qid=Q17210008|1=Kii no Kuni Jinmyō-chō}}* records it as “Asakura-no-Kami, Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade.” According to the *Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Register* from the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era|qid=Q3125096}}, repairs to subordinate shrines were carried out in May of {{ill|lt=Kankō|Q2736722|qid=Q2736722|1=Kankō}} 2 ({{ill|lt=1005|Q19231|qid=Q19231|1=1005}}), with reconstructions recorded in May of {{ill|lt=Eitoku|Q1145805|qid=Q1145805|1=Eitoku}} 2 ({{ill|lt=1382|Q6335|qid=Q6335|1=1382}}), April of {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|qid=Q1193078|1=Ōei}} 18 ({{ill|lt=1411|Q6155|qid=Q6155|1=1411}}), December of {{ill|lt=Eikyō|Q1193059|qid=Q1193059|1=Eikyō}} 10 ({{ill|lt=1438|Q6377|qid=Q6377|1=1438}}), August of {{ill|lt=Kōshō|Q1143364|qid=Q1143364|1=Kōshō}} 3 ({{ill|lt=1457|Q6518|qid=Q6518|1=1457}}), and during the {{ill|lt=Eishō|Q1193577|qid=Q1193577|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} era ({{ill|lt=1504|Q6148|qid=Q6148|1=1504}}–{{ill|lt=1521|Q6288|qid=Q6288|1=1521}}). During warfare in the {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} era ({{ill|lt=1585|Q6736|qid=Q6736|1=1585}}), the shrine lost its land holdings. In {{ill|lt=Bunroku|Q1373039|qid=Q1373039|1=Bunroku}} 5 ({{ill|lt=1596|Q6785|qid=Q6785|1=1596}}), the Wakayama Castle deputy governor {{ill|lt=Kuwana Shigeharu|Q11537542|qid=Q11537542|1=Kuwayama Shigeharu}} rebuilt the shrine. It was later destroyed by fire in {{ill|lt=Manji|Q1145295|qid=Q1145295|1=Manji (era)}} 2 ({{ill|lt=1659|Q6995|qid=Q6995|1=1659}}), and restored the following year by the {{ill|lt=Kishū Tokugawa clan|Q11605046|qid=Q11605046|1=Kishū Tokugawa family}}. According to the “Saginomori Shrine Record” from {{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} 8 ({{ill|lt=1723|Q6921|qid=Q6921|1=1723}}), the location of the original Shikinaisha Asakura Shrine had become unknown. During the {{ill|lt=Enpō|Q1145735|qid=Q1145735|1=Enpō}} era ({{ill|lt=1673|Q7617|qid=Q7617|1=1673}}–{{ill|lt=1681|Q7645|qid=Q7645|1=1681}}), a Confucian scholar of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Wakayama Domain|1=UNKNOWN}}, Ri Baikei, identified the shrine—then called “Kenkoku-sha”—as the Shikinaisha and renamed it “Asakura Shrine.”“Asakura Shrine” entry, *Place Names of Wakayama Prefecture*. In the Meiji period, under the {{ill|lt=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was designated a Village Shrine. The shrine buildings were destroyed in the Wakayama air raids during World War II and were rebuilt in 1960. === Court Rank === * Senior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade (as recorded in the *{{ill|lt=Kii Province Jinmyōchō|Q17210008|qid=Q17210008|1=Kii no Kuni Jinmyō-chō}}*) — listed as “Asakura-no-Kami.” === Subsidiary Shrines === * Shinmei Shrine * Komori Katte Shrine === Local Information === '''Address''' * 22 Saginomori Myōjin-chō, {{ill|lt=Wakayama City|Q200747|qid=Q200747|1=Wakayama (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|Q131314|qid=Q131314|1=Wakayama Prefecture}} '''Access''' * Train: {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} / {{ill|lt=Nankai Electric Railway|Q1188230|qid=Q1188230|lt=Nankai Railway|1=Nankai Electric Railway}} {{ill|lt=Wakayamashi Station|Q3455721|qid=Q3455721|1=Wakayamashi Station}} (about 7 minutes on foot) * Bus: {{ill|lt=Wakayama Bus|Q11417290|qid=Q11417290|1=Wakayama Bus}} Uji bus stop (about 3 minutes on foot) === Notes === {{reflist}} === References === * *{{ill|lt=Nihon Rekishi Chimei Taikei|Q17213509|qid=Q17213509|1=Japanese Historical Topography Series}}: Place Names of Wakayama Prefecture* ({{ill|lt=Heibonsha|Q11482108|qid=Q11482108|1=Heibonsha}}), Wakayama City, Asakura Shrine entry === External Links === {{Commonscat|Asakura-jinja (Wakayama)}} * [http://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=1028 Asakura Shrine] – Wakayama Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines {{Shinto Navbox}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Asakura Shrine (Wakayama)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asakura Shrine (Wakayama)]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kii Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Wakayama]] [[Category:紀伊国の式内社|あさくらしんしや]] [[Category:Son-sha in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:紀伊国の式内社]]
